overall.description: Game engine footage showing a large white cruise ship docked at an urban waterfront. The camera moves smoothly along the concrete dock from the ship's bow toward the stern, revealing the vessel's lifeboats and funnels against a backdrop of modern high-rise buildings and clear blue skies.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the concrete dock parallel to the cruise ship's hull

entered.detail: large white cruise ship with blue accent stripes and multiple decks
tall modern high-rise building with grid-patterned facade
wide concrete dock surface with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a concrete dock beside the bow of a massive white cruise ship. A tall grid-patterned high-rise dominates the right side of the frame while the ship's hull fills the left. The scene is brightly lit under a clear blue sky with no pedestrians or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock area passing cruise ship midsection with funnels visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock past the ship's midsection toward the stern

entered.detail: white and blue smokestacks and upper deck structures of the cruise ship
low-rise industrial building with red-brown facade in the distance

changed.to: showing midship and stern sections with lifeboats

segments.scene_description: The camera progresses along the dock revealing the cruise ship's midsection with visible lifeboats and upper deck funnels. The tall building on the right recedes into the distance as a red industrial building comes into view ahead. The ship's hull continues to dominate the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area beyond the cruise ship

events.description: cruise ship completely exits the frame left, revealing open dock and waterfront buildings

agents.ego_description: passing the stern of the ship and continuing into the open dock area

entered.detail: expansive open concrete area with distant waterfront buildings
sparse trees and greenery along the distant waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the cruise ship's stern and the vessel exits the frame, revealing an expansive open dock area. Low warehouse buildings and waterfront vegetation become visible in the distance as the camera continues moving forward through the empty concrete expanse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a concrete waterfront that transitions from the imposing scale of a docked cruise ship to an expansive, open industrial dock. It begins beside the bow of the massive white vessel, with a tall grid-patterned high-rise dominating the right side of the frame under a clear blue sky. As the camera progresses, the high-rise recedes into the distance and the ship's midsection comes into view, revealing lifeboats and upper deck funnels while a red industrial building appears ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the ship's stern, allowing the vessel to exit the frame and open up the perspective. Finally, the view expands across the empty concrete expanse toward distant low warehouse buildings and waterfront vegetation.
